TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Andrea Bargnani == u siwkay niza tatama, nalecuh i 1985 a mihcan 10 a bulad 26 a demiad, miunduay. mimali i Amilika NBA. u sangelacay a tademaw. u minalu niza sa i Itali Roma. namapili' nu Tuoluntuo Paolung putiput. talakaw ciniza, 213cm. matineng mimali, sisa micumut tu Amilika NBA. kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu nasulitan nu Hulam atu Amilika Andrea Bargnani is an Italian professional basketball player who last played for Baskonia of the Liga ACB and the EuroLeague. The 7 ft 0 in (2.13 m) power forward-center played for Benetton Treviso in the Italian LBA and the EuroLeague before being selected first overall in the 2006 NBA draft by the Toronto Raptors.
S.PHON: == andr…ôa bargnani == u siwkaj niza tatama, nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i **** a mińß ¶an ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, miunduaj. mimar~…ĺi i amir~…ĺika nba. u saŇč…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a tad…ômaw. u minar~…ĺu niza sa i itar~…ĺi *oma. namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° nu tuor~…ĺuntuo paor~…ĺuŇč putiput. tar~…ĺakaw ¶iniza, *** ¶m. matin…ôŇč mimar~…ĺi, sisa mi ¶umut tu amir~…ĺika nba. kakuniza kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan-sur~…ĺu nasur~…ĺitan nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika andr…ôa bargnani is an itar~…ĺian prof…ôssionar~…ĺ bask…ôtbar~…ĺr~…ĺ pr~…ĺaj…ôr wńßo r~…ĺast pr~…ĺaj…ôd for baskonia of tńß…ô r~…ĺiga a ¶b and tńß…ô …ôuror~…ĺ…ôagu…ô. tńß…ô * ft * in (*.** m) pow…ôr forward- ¶…ônt…ôr pr~…ĺaj…ôd for b…ôn…ôtton tr…ô*iso in tńß…ô itar~…ĺian r~…ĺba and tńß…ô …ôuror~…ĺ…ôagu…ô b…ôfor…ô b…ôiŇč s…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶t…ôd first o*…ôrar~…ĺr~…ĺ in tńß…ô **** nba draft bj tńß…ô toronto *aptors.
S.FORM: == Andrea Bargnani == u siwkay niza tatama, nalecuh i 1985 a mihcan 10 a bulad 26 a demiad, miunduay. mimali i Amilika NBA. u sangelacay a tademaw. u minalu niza sa i Itali Roma. namapili' nu Tuoluntuo Paolung putiput. talakaw ciniza, 213cm. matineng mimali, sisa micumut tu Amilika NBA. kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu nasulitan nu Hulam atu Amilika Andrea Bargnani is an Italian professional basketball player who last played for Baskonia of the Liga ACB and the EuroLeague. The 7 ft 0 in (2.13 m) power forward-center played for Benetton Treviso in the Italian LBA and the EuroLeague before being selected first overall in the 2006 NBA draft by the Toronto Raptors.
